== Notes for [[Item:Q100652|Q100652]] ==

20 Samuel Benvenist b. _____ d. BEF 1204

===References
*Jews, Christian Society, & Royal Power in Medieval Barcelona. By Elka Klein. Page 203. < [https://books.google.com/books?id=f9h_e-3JOYAC&lpg=PA87&dq=Tolsana%20Gracian&pg=PA203#v=onepage&q&f=false GoogleBooks] >

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD8391161EFBBFA9822EF79916CCC54
geni:6000000015844580601

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
